hero.headline: Backend Developer Building Scalable Systems
hero.subheadline: I design and implement robust server-side solutions that power modern applications. With expertise in Python, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure, I solve complex problems to deliver high-performance, maintainable systems.

sections.heading: About Me
sections.content: I'm Aymen, a backend developer passionate about crafting scalable and efficient server-side architectures. My experience spans building RESTful APIs, designing database schemas, and optimizing system performance. I specialize in Python and Node.js, and I thrive in environments where I can tackle challenging technical problems. When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies or contributing to open-source projects.

features.title: E-Commerce API Platform
features.description: Role: Lead Backend Developer. Tech Stack: Python, Django, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker. Impact: Built a scalable API handling 10K+ daily transactions for a multi-vendor marketplace, reducing response times by 40%.

features.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Role: Backend Engineer. Tech Stack: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Socket.io, AWS Lambda. Impact: Developed a real-time data processing pipeline that aggregates and displays user metrics with sub-second latency, supporting data-driven decisions for a SaaS product.

features.title: Microservices Authentication System
features.description: Role: Full Stack Developer. Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, JWT, OAuth2, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL. Impact: Designed and implemented a secure, distributed authentication service adopted across 15+ microservices, improving system security and reducing auth-related incidents by 80%.

images.name: hero_image
images.prompt: Professional headshot of a male software developer in a modern office setting, wearing business casual attire, looking confident and approachable, natural lighting

images.name: background_image
images.prompt: Abstract digital art representing server networks and data flow, with glowing lines and geometric patterns in blue and purple tones, tech-themed, seamless pattern
